MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Yvonne Gavros is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Zenon Barron is present.
Attorney Lindsay M. Andrews representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JUN-18-2012 is vacated.
